name: 动量
subject: physics
curriculum_points: HS-PS2-2. Use mathematical representations to support the claim that the total momentum of a system of objects is conserved when there is no net force on the system.
HS-PS2-3. Apply scientific and engineering ideas to design, evaluate, and refine a device that minimizes the force on a macroscopic object during a collision.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Matter.js 碰撞模拟：两球碰撞观察动量守恒，可调质量/初速度，显示动量条形图
interactive_resources.description: Matter.js 动量守恒碰撞模拟
PhET 碰撞实验室：动量守恒验证（中文版）
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「动量」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-PS2-2. Use mathematical representations to support the claim that the total momentum of a system of objects is conser…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-PS2-3. Apply scientific and engineering ideas to design, evaluate, and refine… 对理解「动量」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
